text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Tracen Meet has come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I see the stands are positively packed, as always.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, this is Tracen's big event, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fans
text_block_list.text: Ryaaaan! You can do it! We've got your back, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That explains why your fans are more energetic than usual. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Fans
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Show 'em what a Mejiro can do! Get out there and do the
Mejiro name proud!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow Mejiro, I must also uphold a certain standard. Do not
expect me to go easy on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're really something, McQueen. You always do your best to
meet everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that justification for you to lose?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Surely you don't think it would be acceptable to lose today because I have some grand, noble reason for racing and you don't... do you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan... My question still stands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why did you come to Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Race Staff A
text_block_list.text: McQueen, Ryan! Please get ready for your race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (I wonder...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(When did I start wondering if it was okay for me to win? And... when
was it that I started having that feeling every time I see you?)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Our runners have taken their places at the starting gate. The 3,200
meter turf race... begins now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've got a fantastic lineup today, but all eyes are on our two Mejiro
racers—Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(McQueen... You're like the ideal Umamusume to me... You're elegant
and proud, just like a Mejiro successor should be.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(For as long as I can remember, I've been by your side. I've seen it
all—your willpower, your hard work... I've watched you fall down, only
to get back up.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (So, when I race you or others like you...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (Maybe... I feel like it'd be okay for me to lose. Is that it?)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the final 1,000 meter mark! McQueen is among the
leading pack, while Ryan trails behind. Is her heart not in it?!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan kicks it into high gear! That acceleration is crazy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(No! No, that's not it at all! Sure, I've wondered if it would be fair for
me to win, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (I never EVER thought it would be okay for me to lose!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(No way, no how! Even when we used to race up that hill together,
I—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: —Aaaargggh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're entering the final stretch! McQueen is in the lead, with Ryan
in fast pursuit! They've both got their eyes on the finishing post, but
only one can cross it first!

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text:
Urrraauugh!
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Finish! What a close call! The two Mejiros had the crowd on the edge
of their seats! Listen to those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the winner of the race is... McQueen, by the thinnest of
margins.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Aaargh! I was so close too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan... you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You asked me why I came to Tracen Academy, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I just liked exercising, I could do that anywhere. There's no need to
enter races if I'm perfectly satisfied with gains from the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But now I know... I came to Tracen to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to hone my body and skills, race against the others, and
come out on top... I'm here to beat strong racers like you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Then I too shall give my all as your opponent. As a Mejiro, I
have no intentions of losing to anyone, especially you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ha! Yeah, well, when it comes to the gym, I know I've got you beat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: These muscles of mine will carry me wherever I need them to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fanboy
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, Ryan! We'll be right there with you the whole way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fangirl
text_block_list.text: That's right! We've got your back, now and forever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Ehehe... Thanks, guys!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Thanks for recommending this race to me. It really was a
valuable experience, just like you said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um... actually... There's something I wanted to ask you, b-but you can
say no if you want...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Would you... be my trainer?! My one and only trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grin from ear to ear. I'll have my hands full with such an enormous
talent, but I can't wait to see where the future takes us both!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
W-wait... "My one and only" kinda sounds like a... l-love confession,
doesn't it? A-ah... Aaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Please forget I said that!
